title: scene.treeChanged event params
description: Sent by the engine over the wire when the scene tree changes. Introduced in protocol version 0.2. Carries a snapshot copy of the affected nodes (DTO, never a live engine pointer); fullRefreshRequired signals that the editor should re-fetch the whole tree via scene.getTree instead of applying changedNodes incrementally.

changedNodes.description: Optional snapshot copies of the nodes that changed. Each is a full scene node DTO. Absent when only fullRefreshRequired is meaningful.

fullRefreshRequired.description: When true, the editor should re-fetch the entire scene tree rather than apply changedNodes incrementally.
